savemanager_tab.title: SaveManager
savemanager_tab.info:
SaveManager allows you to backup, restore and sync MiSTer saves and savestates.

Backups are stored locally on your PC and are never modified.
The Sync folder is used to merge saves between devices.
savemanager_tab.sync_info:
Sync merges local SaveManager data with the current MiSTer saves, using your PC as the middleman.

Newest files are kept, then the merged result is uploaded back to the MiSTer.

This is a manual sync process.
For automatic syncing, install ftp_save_sync from the Scripts tab (requires FTP access with write permissions).
savemanager_tab.prepare_save_folders_failed:
Could not prepare the MiSTer save folders.

{error}
savemanager_tab.task_already_running: A SaveManager task is already running.
savemanager_tab.no_backups_found: No backups found for this device.

zapscripts_scan_notice_dialog.message:
Scanning in MiSTer Companion requires a populated Zaparoo media database.

You can build that database using the Zaparoo mobile app or the Zaparoo script on your MiSTer.

Fetching your game list in MiSTer Companion can take a while, especially with large libraries.

If you add new games and want them to appear here, you will need to rescan in Zaparoo first, and then rescan in MiSTer Companion.

scripts_tab.description_update_all: Install, configure, and run update_all directly from MiSTer Companion.
scripts_tab.description_zaparoo: Install Zaparoo and enable its boot service.
scripts_tab.description_migrate_sd: Install or remove the migrate_sd script for SD card migration.
scripts_tab.description_cifs: Install, configure, mount, and remove CIFS network share scripts.
scripts_tab.description_auto_time: Automatically set timezone and current time for your MiSTer.
scripts_tab.description_dav_browser: Browse a WebDAV server, download ROMs directly to your MiSTer, and optionally launch them after download.
scripts_tab.description_ftp_save_sync: Sync MiSTer saves to a remote FTP or SFTP server, with optional savestate syncing and automatic boot-time service startup.
scripts_tab.description_static_wallpaper: Install or remove static_wallpaper support. Setting or removing the active static wallpaper is now handled from the Wallpapers tab.
scripts_tab.another_task_running: Another script task is still running.
scripts_tab.uninstall_update_all_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove update_all?
scripts_tab.update_all_not_installed_message: Install update_all first before opening the configurator.
scripts_tab.update_all_config_error_message:
Could not prepare update_all configuration files.

{error}
scripts_tab.run_update_all_warning:
update_all will run through SSH.

The output will NOT appear on the MiSTer TV screen.
It will only be visible inside MiSTer Companion.

If you want the output to appear on the TV screen, run update_all from:
• ZapScripts in MiSTer Companion
• The Scripts menu on the MiSTer itself

Continue?
scripts_tab.log_mister_disconnected_after_update_all: MiSTer disconnected after update_all, likely due to reboot.

This tool installs the 'migrate_sd' script on your MiSTer.

Important:

mister_settings_tab.info:
MiSTer Settings allows you to edit MiSTer.ini with an Easy and Advanced mode.
Backups are stored locally on your PC in a separate MiSTerSettings folder.
Settings are only applied when you press Save.

This is usually caused by a bundled PyInstaller library conflicting with a system library.

Exit code: {code}
